# This directory holds dry-run build plan artifacts generated by:
#   python -m hfla_control_room.cli plan --config config --output artifacts/dry_run
#
# Files generated here:
#   control_room_build_plan.json  — Machine-readable plan of all assets to be created
#   control_room_build_plan.md    — Human-readable plan summary
#
# These files are regenerated on each plan run and are safe to commit.
# They contain NO live Google Drive IDs and NO PII.
